title: Tanaka's Better Shears
description: Adds five new shears to the game, each with small but unique features!
body:
# **✦ IN NEED OF BETTER SHEARS ? ✦**

![Bonjour je suis Mangrow ._.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2a3ec33d6925f5a1cc648fb6a85c58ec5f87f2a.png)

Ever been tired of your shears breaking after just a few minutes of use ? Wish you had better ones for your leaf-heavy build projects ? Oh, and have you ever wondered why no tool breaks glowstone faster..? In any case, no worries, I've come to the rescue (I know I know, no need to thank me)!

Better shears is a small mod that adds 5 different tiers of shears:
- **Copper shears**

  Easy to make in early game or in bulk, copper shears will drop twice the normal amount of wool a sheep drops when used by a dispenser.
  
  ![Copper shears' crafting recipe: two copper ingots diagonal from each other.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0b04a8a50f9f360c13a7ecf7858ce6654846a22.png)
  
- **Golden shears**

  Those very fancy shears are more of a decoration piece than a useable tool. However if you need to gather a lot of cobwebs or vines, golden shears might be useful to you : they will mine them instantly.
  
  ![Golden shears' crafting recipe: two gold ingots diagonal from each other.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae74b12ddd595713bca975f2521455ae6a9faa38.png)

- **Diamond shears**

  Now, for the _actually_ better shears : for an iron ingot and a diamond, you can craft diamond shears. Those are simply a direct upgrade over vanilla shears : more durability, and faster mining speed.
  
  ![Diamond shears' crafting recipe: an iron ingot and a diamond on top, diagonal from each other.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fd16bb9814c8bb35ebae2a696a84171f5f6370f.png)

- **Netherite shears**

  Still upset that your diamond shears aren't as good as they could be ? Here's something to t-shear you up! Netherite shears won't just last longer and mine faster, they're also the only shears to be enchantable with looting... for more wool per wool! They also break glowstone instantly, and drop the full block without silk touch.
  
  ![Netherite shears' crafting recipe: combining diamond shears with a netherite ingot and a netherite upgrade template, in a smithing table.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49a7058fb6f3e63c43de35ac2a5f153833d8d811.png)

- **Paper shear**

  Not enough paper cuts...?
  
  ![Paper shear's crafting recipe: a stick and a paper on top, diagonal from each other.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/231d5e64b85101edeab76391957128d43701f134.png)
  
  Seriously, why would you make this?

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Special thanks:

Tutorials: Modding by Kaupenjoe - https://www.youtube.com/@ModdingByKaupenjoe

Debugging: Claude AI

Moral support : Megapseudo
